intro: Corniola tenella, also known as Cornu draga, is a perennial plant belonging to the Rutaceae family, commonly found in the Mediterranean region. The plant has been traditionally used to treat a variety of health issues, including inflammation, digestive problems, and respiratory issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The bioactive constituents of Corniola tenella include essential oils, flavonoids, and terpenes, which contribute to its therapeutic effects.
